title: Connecting a domain
body: To connect a domain, open Domains, choose Connect existing domain, update DNS records at your provider, and wait for propagation.

title: Publishing your site
body: Use the Publish button from the editor to make the latest site changes live. You can republish after every edit.

title: Resetting your password
body: Reset your password from the sign in page by selecting Forgot password and following the email link.

title: Adding a contact form
body: Add a contact form from the Add panel, configure the fields, and choose which inbox receives submissions.

title: Setting up online payments
body: Enable online payments by connecting a payment provider, choosing accepted methods, and completing account verification.

title: Creating a blog post
body: Create a blog post from the Blog manager, add title and content, then publish or schedule the post.

title: Inviting collaborators
body: Invite collaborators from Roles and permissions. Assign each person a role that matches the access they need.

title: Changing site template
body: Templates define starting design. To change a template after setup, create a new site and move content manually.

title: Managing SEO settings
body: Edit SEO settings for each page by setting the title tag, meta description, and social sharing image.

title: Adding products
body: Add products from the store catalog. Include product name, images, price, inventory, and shipping details.

title: Configuring shipping
body: Configure shipping regions, rates, and delivery options from the store shipping settings.

title: Creating coupons
body: Create coupons by choosing a discount type, code, usage limits, and expiration date.

title: Viewing analytics
body: View analytics to monitor traffic, popular pages, sales, and visitor behavior over time.

title: Connecting email marketing
body: Connect email marketing tools to collect subscribers, create campaigns, and send newsletters.

title: Restoring a previous version
body: Use site history to review previous versions and restore a saved version if needed.

title: Adding a custom font
body: Upload a custom font from brand settings, then apply it to text styles across the site.

title: Setting up members area
body: Add a members area to let visitors create accounts, log in, and access member-only pages.

title: Managing bookings
body: Create services, set staff availability, define session duration, and accept bookings through the site.

title: Canceling a subscription
body: Cancel a subscription from billing settings. Review renewal date and confirm cancellation before the next charge.

title: Troubleshooting SSL
body: SSL may take time after domain connection. Check DNS records and wait for the certificate to finish issuing.
